title: Complete onboarding wizard successfully and land on dashboard
description: Verifies a new user can complete the multi-step onboarding wizard and is redirected to the dashboard.

steps.description: Type "Acme Serviços" into the Company name field
Type "Rua Exemplo 123, São Paulo" into the Company address field
Select "Consultoria" from the Default service selection

title: Company name rejects invalid characters with inline validation
description: Verifies the Company name field shows an inline validation error when invalid characters are entered.

steps.description: Type "@@@###" into the Company name field
Verify element "Company name field error message" is visible

title: Continue requires Company name before proceeding
description: Verifies the wizard prevents moving to the next step when Company name is missing.

steps.description: Type "Rua Sem Nome 45" into the Company address field
Verify element "Company name field error message" is visible

title: Continue requires Company address before proceeding
description: Verifies the wizard prevents moving to the next step when Company address is missing.

steps.description: Type "Empresa Sem Endereço" into the Company name field
Verify element "Company address field error message" is visible

title: Finish requires a default service selection
description: Verifies the user cannot finish onboarding without selecting a default service.

steps.description: Type "Empresa Alpha" into the Company name field
Type "Rua Alpha 10" into the Company address field
Verify element "Default service selection error message" is visible

title: User can recover from invalid company name by correcting it and continuing
description: Verifies an inline error clears after correcting the Company name and the user can proceed to the next step.

steps.description: Type "!!!" into the Company name field
Verify element "Company name field error message" is visible
Type "Empresa Correta" into the Company name field

title: Dashboard loads and shows metrics and recent activity
description: Verifies the dashboard renders core overview widgets including business metrics and recent activity.

title: Dashboard quick action: New Quote navigates to quote creation
description: Verifies that clicking the New Quote quick action from the dashboard takes the user to the quote creation page.

title: Dashboard quick action: New Client navigates to client creation
description: Verifies that clicking the New Client quick action from the dashboard takes the user to the client creation page (if available).

title: Global search: filter results by client name
description: Verifies that entering a client name into global search shows filtered results on the dashboard.

title: Global search: no results state is shown
description: Verifies that searching for a non-existent term shows a clear empty/no-results state.

title: Dashboard refresh: core quick actions remain visible after reload
description: Verifies dashboard is stable on reload and key quick actions remain visible for continued navigation.

title: Create a new corporate (B2B) client and verify it appears in the clients list
description: Verifies a user can create a new corporate client with required fields and then find it in the clients list.

steps.description: Type "ACME Corp E2E" into the client name field
Type "acme.e2e@example.com" into the contact email field
Type "REG-ACME-10001" into the corporate identifier / registration number field

title: Create a new individual (B2C) client without corporate identifier and verify it appears in the list
description: Verifies a user can create an individual client without corporate fields and then find it in the clients list.

steps.description: Type "Maria Silva E2E" into the client name field
Type "maria.silva.e2e@example.com" into the contact email field
Verify text "Maria Silva E2E" is visible

title: Edit an existing client phone number and verify the updated value on details page
description: Verifies a user can open a client, edit the phone field, save, and see the updated value on the client details screen.

steps.description: Click on the first client row in the clients list

title: Validate required fields when creating a new client
description: Verifies required field validation prevents saving a client when mandatory fields are missing.

steps.description: Verify text "Name is required" is visible
Verify text "Email is required" is visible

title: Create a new draft quote with one item, payment options, and warranty enabled
description: Verifies a user can create a new quote with an existing client, add an item, configure options, save, and see it listed as Draft.

steps.description: Select an existing client from the client selector
Select an option in "Payment options" (any available option)
Click to enable the "Warranty" box toggle

title: Edit an existing quote item quantity and confirm totals update
description: Verifies a user can open a quote, edit item quantity, save, and see updated totals on the quote detail page.

steps.description: Click on the first quote in the quotes list

title: Generate PDF for an existing quote and observe generation progress UI
description: Verifies a user can start PDF generation from a quote and sees a visible progress/loading state indicating generation is occurring.

steps.description: Click on the first quote in the quotes list

title: Validation: Attempt to save a new quote without items shows required error
description: Verifies the quote editor blocks saving when no items are added and shows the specified validation message.

steps.description: Verify text "Add at least one item to the quote" is visible

title: Error handling: PDF generation server action failure shows user-facing error
description: Verifies the UI shows an error message when PDF generation fails for a quote.

steps.description: Click on a quote that is known to fail PDF generation (test data prepared for failure)
Verify text "Unable to generate PDF, try again" is visible

title: Toggle warranty off after enabling and confirm warranty section visibility changes
description: Verifies the warranty option can be toggled on and off and the warranty section reflects the toggle state visually.

steps.description: Select an existing client from the client selector
Click to enable the "Warranty" box toggle
Click to disable the "Warranty" box toggle

title: Update company address successfully and see confirmation
description: Verifies a user can edit the company address on the Profile page and see a success confirmation.

steps.description: Fill "123 Test Street, Suite 400" into the "Company address" field
Verify text "123 Test Street, Suite 400" is visible

title: See current user and company information on Profile page
description: Verifies the Profile page displays the current user and company information in view mode.

title: Invalid company registration number shows field validation error
description: Verifies invalid registration number format is rejected and a field-level validation message is shown.

steps.description: Fill "INVALID-###" into the "Company registration number" field
Verify element "Company registration number" is visible

title: Validation prevents saving when registration number is invalid (no success toast)
description: Verifies that an invalid registration number does not produce a success message and keeps the user on the edit form.

steps.description: Fill "bad" into the "Company registration number" field
Verify text "Profile updated" is not visible

title: Cancel editing does not persist changes
description: Verifies that canceling out of edit mode does not save modifications to the company address.

steps.description: Fill "999 Cancel Ave" into the "Company address" field
Verify text "999 Cancel Ave" is not visible

title: Save button disabled or blocked when required fields are cleared
description: Verifies the form blocks saving when a required company field is emptied and shows a visible validation message.

title: Edit mode can be entered and exited without errors
description: Verifies the user can enter edit mode and return to view mode with no visible errors.

title: Company logo upload flow is not covered due to file upload restriction
description: Explicitly skips testing logo upload because file upload interactions are excluded by the test constraints.

title: View notifications list from the notifications center
description: Verifies the user can open the notification center and see a list of recent notifications.

steps.description: Navigate to the application home page.
Click the Notifications (bell) icon in the header or top navigation.
Verify a list of notifications is visible.
Verify at least one notification item is visible.

title: Open a quote approval notification and verify navigation attempt
description: Verifies clicking a quote approval notification triggers navigation toward the quote detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to the application home page.
Click the Notifications (bell) icon in the header or top navigation.
Click the notification item that mentions quote approval.

title: Open support widget and submit a support ticket successfully
description: Verifies the user can submit a support ticket from the support widget and see a success confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to the application home page.
Click the Support widget button or help icon to open the Support widget.
Type "Issue creating a quote" into the Subject field.
Type "I am seeing an error when trying to save a new quote. Please help." into the Description field.

title: After submitting a ticket, verify it appears in Support area
description: Verifies a newly submitted ticket is visible in the support tickets list.

steps.description: Navigate to the application home page.
Click the Support widget button or help icon to open the Support widget.
Type "Billing question" into the Subject field.
Type "Can you clarify how the subscription is billed monthly?" into the Description field.
Click the link or button to view tickets in Support (for example, "View tickets" or "Go to Support").

title: Support widget validation: prevent submitting with empty required fields
description: Verifies the support widget blocks ticket submission and shows validation when required fields are empty.

steps.description: Navigate to the application home page.
Click the Support widget button or help icon to open the Support widget.

title: Support widget handles submission error state gracefully
description: Verifies the UI shows an error message when ticket submission fails.

steps.description: Navigate to the application home page.
Click the Support widget button or help icon to open the Support widget.
Type "Cannot access support" into the Subject field.
Type "Submitting a ticket does not work from my account." into the Description field.
Verify text "Unable to submit ticket, try again" is visible.

title: Support widget cancel/close behavior without losing page context
description: Verifies the user can close the support widget and remain on the current page context.

steps.description: Navigate to the application home page.
Click the Support widget button or help icon to open the Support widget.
Click the close button on the Support widget.
Verify the Support widget is not visible.

title: Open a support-message notification and verify navigation toward support ticket detail
description: Verifies clicking an in-app notification about a new message opens the related support ticket detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to the application home page.
Click the Notifications (bell) icon in the header or top navigation.
Click the notification item that mentions a new message or support reply.
